notes: On/Off via MPE Activation message RPN 6
Always rounds to nearest integer value

usage: 0-31: 1-2 frequency modulation; 32-63: Filter envelope to oscillator 2 frequency; 64-95: Filter envelope to oscillator 2 wave; 96-127: Filter envelope to sub wave
0: Cutoff; 32: Oscillator 2 frequency; 64: Oscillator wave; 96: Sub wave
